creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
Hi,

Any chance of a commit happening on:

    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128241

It's been untouched for more than a month now. Should I be applying
for maintainership of this port instead?

Cheers.
--
